examples: We also own the bronze life mask of Lincoln cast by Leonard Volk.
Newspapers mocked him with punning headlines, such as "o volk! Terre 'blanche is back again".
On the family farm, young Marais was brought up on stories of the sufferings of his volk.
Indeed, the only two commenters on most of the articles I find are Volk and Geraldine Dawson, chief science officer at Autism Speaks.
